message:
chore(gitignore): ignore cargo-fuzz duplicate corpus tree under fuzz/fuzz/

cargo-fuzz writes its corpus to `./fuzz/corpus/<target>/` relative to the
working directory it was invoked from. The canonical, tracked corpus lives
at fuzz/corpus/<target>/ — but if cargo-fuzz is invoked while cwd is
fuzz/ (e.g. `cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_time_parser`), the
relative path resolves to `fuzz/fuzz/corpus/<target>/` instead, creating
a parallel mirror of the same seed files. That mirror has been
appearing as untracked in `git status` even though it's a duplicate of
fuzz/corpus/fuzz_time_parser/'s 23 tracked seed files.

Add `fuzz/fuzz/` to .gitignore so the mirror tree stays out of the
working-tree status. The real fuzz/corpus/ remains tracked exactly as
before.

No code changes — pure ignore addition.

files.patch:
@@ -189,3 +189,10 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 # tests/pages_export_golden.rs when a golden diverges from expected, strictly
 # for local diffing ahead of UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 regeneration. Never committed.
 tests/golden/**/*.actual
+
+# cargo-fuzz duplicate corpus tree, created when cargo-fuzz is invoked from
+# inside the fuzz/ subcrate (default destination is `./fuzz/corpus/<target>/`,
+# which from within fuzz/ resolves to `fuzz/fuzz/corpus/<target>/`). The real
+# tracked corpus lives at fuzz/corpus/<target>/; this nested tree is a
+# regeneratable mirror of the same seed files.
+fuzz/fuzz/
